currentValue.description: Current value of all the investments.

realizedProfitLoss.description: The all-time realised profit loss from all of the trades executed.

totalCost.description: The cost basis of your current investments. The total amount of funds you've invested in the shares you currently own.

unrealizedProfitLoss.description: The potential profit/loss of your current investments, showing how much you could gain or lose if you were to sell them now.
